key_operational_preconditions.E5_plus_EMA1D21: Requires strict LT1 (<4h automated execution). DO NOT deploy if latency cannot be guaranteed.
key_operational_preconditions.E0_plus_EMA1D21: Requires LT1. Tolerates occasional LT2 better than E5_plus.
key_operational_preconditions.E0: Minimum LT2. Most delay-resilient binary but still loses 29.5% Sharpe at D4.
key_operational_preconditions.E5: Minimum LT2. Higher Sharpe than E0 but slightly more delay-fragile.
key_operational_preconditions.SM: No latency constraint. Viable under LT1/LT2/LT3 including manual execution.

top_open_risks: Exit delay not tested — only entry delay was simulated
Combined disruption (simultaneous miss + delay) not tested
Bootstrap Sharpe for E0_plus/E5_plus is lower than E0 (OOS consistency concern)
WFO 4/8 for E5, 5/8 for E5_plus — marginal validation confidence
